title: calantica olivacea
intro: Calantica olivacea, also known as the Olive Yellow Passionflower, is a species of flowering plant in the Passifloraceae family, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Calantica olivacea include its ability to act as a sedative, anxiolytic, and antispasmodic agent, which makes it useful in treating anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce stress and promote relaxation, as well as its ability to alleviate symptoms of menopause and other hormonal imbalances. Calantica olivacea can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
